subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Revelation hath proclaimed: There is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. This is a Day wherein the trees have yielded their fruits and the seas are surging [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان الوجی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم هذا یوم فیه اثمرت الاشجار و ماجت البحار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @living waters; water of life
